use_cases: Displaying pricing plan labels such as 'Popular' or 'Best Value' in bento grid layouts
Showing status indicators and highlights on pricing cards
Attracting attention to featured or recommended pricing tiers
Categorizing pricing features with visual labels
ai_summary: A versatile badge component with multiple style variants designed for labeling pricing tiers and highlighting featured content in bento grid pricing layouts. Features standard variants including default, secondary, destructive, and outline styles with hover state support.
